modules.source_status_flag: Generated from approved Module 5 PDF source map.
learning_objectives: Explain the purpose and rules of proper body mechanics.
Identify comfort and safety measures used to lift, turn, move, and position patients/residents in bed.
List and describe body positions for bedridden patients/residents.
Describe appropriate body mechanics used to ambulate a patient/resident.
